The Boston Housing dataset is widely available on the internet, including on the UCI Machine Learning Repository. You can access the dataset using the following link:

https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/datasets/Housing

The dataset is provided in both CSV and TXT formats and includes 506 instances with 14 attributes. The attributes include features such as crime rate, number of rooms, age of the house, and others.

Alternatively, you can also access the Boston Housing dataset using popular machine learning libraries such as scikit-learn or via the Boston Housing dataset package in R.

- `score_model`: A function that will calculate the Akaike Information Criterion (AIC) score for a given model and set of predictor variables.
